utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final coverage plan: it includes all five top-level items. Next, verify if each is fully specified with all details as required: The requirement says each item should include costs. 1) health_coverage: It provides plan names and costs for user_parent_physical (€210/month) and user_parent_mental (€120/month), spouse_parent_physical (€110/month), spouse_parent_mental (€60/month). However, children's coverage is described but no explicit cost is provided for them under health_coverage, and it's unclear if the plan cost already includes dependents; thus not fully specified for all family members. 2) property_coverage: home_contents has a plan and cost (€95/month); appears fully specified for the requested home/contents with costs. 3) travel_coverage: has a plan and cost (€115/month); appears fully specified. 4) additional_services: includes descriptions but no costs; the format requires costs, so this is not fully specified. 5) total_budget: monthly and annual cost breakdown provided; appears fully specified. Therefore, fully specified items with all required details: property_coverage, travel_coverage, total_budget = 3 out of 5.
